# WorldOfTaxonomy

> Unified global classification knowledge graph. 1,000+ systems, 1.2M+ nodes, 321K+ crosswalk edges.
> Connects NAICS, ISIC, NACE, HS, ICD, LOINC, SOC, ISCO, CPC, UNSPSC, and 990+ more as equal peers.
> Open source (MIT license). Data provided for informational purposes only - use at your own risk.

## API

Base URL: https://worldoftaxonomy.com/api/v1

- GET /systems - List all classification systems
- GET /systems/{id} - System detail with metadata and root nodes
- GET /systems/{id}/nodes/{code} - Node detail with parent, children
- GET /systems/{id}/nodes/{code}/children - Child nodes
- GET /systems/{id}/nodes/{code}/ancestors - Ancestor chain to root
- GET /systems/{id}/nodes/{code}/equivalences - Cross-system mappings
- GET /search?q={query} - Full-text search across all systems
- GET /equivalences/stats - Crosswalk edge counts per system pair
- GET /countries/{code} - Country taxonomy profile
- POST /classify - Classify free-text against all systems (Pro+ tier)

Authentication: Bearer token (JWT or API key with wot_ prefix).
Rate limits: 30 req/min anonymous, 100/min free, 1K/min pro, 10K/min enterprise.

## MCP Server

Transport: stdio
Install: pip install -r requirements.txt
Run: python3 -m world_of_taxonomy mcp

22 tools including: list_classification_systems, search_classifications,
translate_code, translate_across_all_systems, classify_business,
get_country_taxonomy_profile, explore_industry_tree

## Key Use Cases for AI Agents

- Industry classification: "What NAICS/ISIC/NACE codes match a cloud kitchen?"
- Trade code lookup: "What HS code for lithium-ion battery packs?"
- Regulatory mapping: "Which regulations apply to a fintech in the EU?"
- Occupation matching: "Map 'data engineer' across SOC, ISCO, ESCO, O*NET"
- Medical coding: "ICD-10-CM code for Type 2 diabetes with neuropathy"
- Cross-system translation: "Convert NAICS 5112 to ISIC, NACE, and SIC"

## Links

- Website: https://worldoftaxonomy.com
- Documentation: https://worldoftaxonomy.com/developers
- GitHub: https://github.com/colaberry/WorldOfTaxonomy
- API Keys: https://worldoftaxonomy.com/login
- Full reference: https://worldoftaxonomy.com/llms-full.txt
